summary: Comprehensive testing of Jobswish job matching app completed. Fixed critical backend ObjectId serialization bug. All core features tested successfully including auth, job posting, matching, and applicant management.

critical_bugs.impact: Blocked recruiter from viewing job applicants
critical_bugs.fix_applied: Added profile data cleaning to remove ObjectId fields before JSON serialization

ui_bugs.issue: Toast overlays intercept button clicks causing timeout errors
ui_bugs.impact: Intermittent click failures during automated testing

passed_tests: Job posting with all required fields
Resume builder with education toggles and file uploads
Job matching with AI-powered match scores
